products.name: Control Actuation Systems (CAS)
products.descriptor: High-power-density electromechanical actuation systems for missile fin, UAV, and thrust-vector control

evidence.snippet: Our advanced, high power density Control Actuation Systems (CAS) are designed to meet the challenging performance requirements for today’s advanced aerospace and weapons platforms.

*   Guided Munitions
*   Guided Rockets
*   Hypersonic Vehicles
*   Tactical Missiles
*   Thrust Vector Controls
*   Torpedoes
*   UAV
*   UUV

products.notes: MCAS-series models (MCAS0008, MCAS0025, MCAS0100, MCAS0125, MCAS0400, MCAS1200, MCAS1632, MCAS6720) are individual SKUs within this family.

products.name: Electronic Motor Controls
products.descriptor: Ruggedized digital motor drive and closed-loop servo controllers for aerospace and defense platforms

evidence.snippet:
### Ruggedized Electronic Controls
Electronic control systems that incorporate cutting-edge technologies with proven high-voltage motor drive and closed loop servo techniques to provide optimal solutions for critical applications.

products.name: MPACT® Pure Air Compression Technology
products.descriptor: Integrated pneumatic compression system combining micro-compressor, electronics, and valve/manifold

evidence.snippet: We have a wide variety of proven, reliable high pressure pneumatic systems innovations – from simple high pressure valves and bottles to the innovative MPACT® Pure Air Compression Technology system which is fully integrated with electronics, micro-compressor, and valve/manifold system.

products.name: Motorfox Motors
products.descriptor: DC brushless motors for aerospace and defense actuation applications
products.notes: Dedicated product page (marotta.com/motorfox-motors) was skipped in mirror crawl (status: skipped_class_budget). Only nav-level citation available.

products.name: MPACT6000
products.descriptor: Compressor system electronic controller with 800 W motor drive output and CANBus communications

evidence.snippet:
### MPACT6000
#### Compressor System Electronic Controller
Engineered with extensive BIT and reporting capabilities, the MPACT6000 electronic control unit has a motor drive output to 800W, 1200W peak, sensorless.  Includes digital CANBus communications and three phase AC input power with power factor correction.

products.name: MPACT 3000
products.descriptor: Sensorless variable-speed compressor system electronic controller with active power factor correction

evidence.snippet:
### MPACT 3000
#### Compressor System Electronic Controller
The MPACT3000 controller features a DC brushless, sensorless variable speed operation which reduces cost and weight while increasing reliability.  Its Active Power Factor Correction (PFC) automatically adjusts the characteristics of the electric load for maximum stability and efficiency, while minimizing harmonics on the main power feed.
